summary: The legal contract has exactly 240 input pairs, and the app-local reference answers each pair by one lookup in a fixed verified prefix-sum table, so no unbounded runtime variable exists for scaling.

workload_bound.source_constraint: k is an integer from 2 through 9 and n is an integer from 1 through 30

replacement_checks.evidence: The fixed table has eight rows of thirty prefix sums, and solve performs one row lookup and one indexed lookup.
The certificate regression checks all 240 legal pairs against an independent numeric palindrome generator.
